name: The Inner Ways Nightclub Rave
description: Hello wanderers, visit our HQ pool area and dance to IRL live music played by our guild DJ's every Friday night 30 mins after in-game reset! Come chat, dance and bring your friends! :)

name: The Inner Ways Nightclub Rave (Sat)
description: Hello wanderers, visit our HQ pool area and dance to IRL live music played by our guild DJ's every Saturday night 30 mins after in-game reset! Come chat, dance and bring your friends! :)

name: Dress to Impress
description:
Dress to Impress
Outfits speak louder than words.. what's your vibe?
Anyone is welcome to join, limited spaces - Guild members get priority
Battlepass prizes up for grabs for 3 winners

Voicechat will be used (ask for link)

name: Beyond The Wall with Carni
description:
@ℭ𝔞𝔯𝔫𝔦  is venturing deep into CN territory: solo world and Family Business islands, all live streaming on Discord!  Open to everyone!
Come watch, explore alongside her, and chat in vocal in ⁠General.  Carni will be communicating through text.

name: Dive in to Dragon City - Base tour dragons-Heirs (10111177)
description:
Dragons-Heirs base tour, you will dive in our dragon city, 
tour is with voice telling you about city and full of stories.
